more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Zimbabwean artist Option Nyahunzvi explores cultural values in a bold new exhibition
more.description: By Barnabas Ticha Muvhuti, The Conversation In Zimbabwe, hunhu is a cultural belief system that instructs us to embrace our neighbours, honour our elders and respect each other’s rights. Also known as ubuntu, it’s a way of being that resonates with southern Africa’s interconnected but diverse communities, where generational wisdom and values are passed from elders to the [...]The post Zimbabwean artist Option Nyahunzvi explores cultural values in a bold new exhibition appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com.

more.title: Zimbabwe taking steps to clear $23bn debt, president says
more.description: Bloomberg Zimbabwe is taking steps to clear the $23 billion it owes multilateral institutions, as talks with lenders progress well, President Emmerson Mnangagwa said.
